title: Moving Day
learningGoal: The learner will parse rapid auditory strings to accurately identify animate ownership markers ('s) and accurately distinguish between the target language's proximal minimal pair (/ɪ/ in 'this' vs /i:/ in 'these').
instructions: Listen to a husband and wife packing boxes to move to a new house. They speak quickly! Listen closely to hear WHO owns the items, and pay special attention to the difference between 'This' and 'These'. Answer the 8 questions.

contentItems.text: Remember, 'This' sounds like a short, fast snake (ih-ss). 'These' sounds like a long, buzzing bee (ee-zz)!

listeningGoal: Isolate the /z/ morphological marker of possession in rapid speech and correctly decode spatial demonstratives.
audioScenario: A couple sorting items into boxes in their living room.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Okay, Amit. Bring me that big box.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओके, अमित। ब्रिंग मी दैट बिग बॉक्स।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ठीक है, अमित। मुझे वह बड़ा डिब्बा लाओ।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: This box? Or that one near the door?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: दिस बॉक्स? और दैट वन नियर द डोर?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: यह डिब्बा? या वह जो दरवाज़े के पास है?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: That one near the door of the kitchen.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: दैट वन नियर द डोर ऑफ द किचन।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: वह जो रसोई के दरवाज़े के पास है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Here you go. What are we putting in here?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: हियर यू गो। वॉट आर वी पुटिंग इन हियर?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ये लो। हम इसमें क्या रख रहे हैं?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: We are packing the children's toys. Look at this mess.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: वी आर पैकिंग द चिल्ड्रन्स टॉयज़। लुक एट दिस मेस।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: हम बच्चों के खिलौने पैक कर रहे हैं। इस गड़बड़ी को देखो।
क्या ये राहुल की कारें हैं?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, those are Neha's cars. Rahul's cars are red.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, दोज़ आर नेहा'स कार्स। राहुल'स कार्स आर रेड।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, वे नेहा की कारें हैं। राहुल की कारें लाल हैं।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Oh, right. Okay, what about this blue book?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओह, राइट। ओके, वॉट अबाऊट दिस ब्लू बुक?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ओह, सही बात। ठीक है, इस नीली किताब का क्या?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Be careful! The cover of the book is torn.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: बी केयरफुल! द कवर ऑफ द बुक इज़ टार्न।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: सावधान रहो! किताब का कवर फटा हुआ है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Yes. Put my book in this small box.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: येस। पुट माई बुक इन दिस स्मॉल बॉक्स।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: हाँ। मेरी किताब को इस छोटे डिब्बे में रखो।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Okay. And those big plates? Should I pack them?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओके। एंड दोज़ बिग प्लेट्स? शुड आई पैक देम?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ठीक है। और वे बड़ी प्लेटें? क्या मुझे उन्हें पैक करना चाहिए?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, those are my mother's plates. I will carry them.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, दोज़ आर माई मदर्स प्लेट्स। आई विल कैरी देम।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, वे मेरी माँ की प्लेटें हैं। मैं उन्हें ले जाऊँगी।

audioTranscriptFull:
Wife: Okay, Amit. Bring me that big box.
Amit: This box? Or that one near the door?
Wife: That one near the door of the kitchen.
Amit: Here you go. What are we putting in here?
Wife: We are packing the children's toys. Look at this mess.
Amit: Are these Rahul's cars?
Wife: No, those are Neha's cars. Rahul's cars are red.
Amit: Oh, right. Okay, what about this blue book?
Wife: Be careful! The cover of the book is torn.
Amit: Is it your book?
Wife: Yes. Put my book in this small box.
Amit: Okay. And those big plates? Should I pack them?
Wife: No, those are my mother's plates. I will carry them.

questionSet.questionText: Where is the box the wife wants? It is near the ____.
What are they putting in the big box?
Who owns the cars that Amit is holding in his hands? (Listen carefully to the name with the 'S)
Did Amit ask about 'This blue book' or 'These blue book'?
The wife says 'The cover ___ the book' is torn. Fill in the blank.
When Amit asks about the plates far away on the table, does he say 'These plates' or 'Those plates'?

feedbackRules.onPass: Astounding! You perfectly heard the tiny 'S' attached to names, and you understood the difference between This and These, even at full speed!
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep trying! Ensure you playback the audio on Slow mode. Listen specifically to the end of the names (Rahul'S, Neha'S) to figure out who owns what.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good ear! Watch out for the 'Of' trap. The wife very clearly says 'The cover OF the book', she does not say 'The book's cover'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Wife: Okay, Amit. Bring me that big box... (matches full transcript)

hintText: If you are confused whether Amit is holding one book or many books, listen to the vowel! If he says 'TH-IH-S', it is one!
commonMistakes: Thinking 'children's' means the children are doing something, rather than owning something.
